general.name: Firefox Auto-Update - App Installer
general.description:
Disables built-in developer auto-updates to prevent App Installers deployment conflicts
https://learn.jamf.com/bundle/technical-articles/page/Disabling_Developer_Auto_Updatesfor_App_Installers_with_Configuration_Profiles.html#task-645
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5F441794-04CF-4F18-8337-CF6033C437A9</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5F441794-04CF-4F18-8337-CF6033C437A9</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Firefox Auto-Update - App Installer</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Disables built-in developer auto-updates to prevent App Installers deployment conflictshttps://learn.jamf.com/bundle/technical-articles/page/Disabling_Developer_Auto_Updatesfor_App_Installers_with_Configuration_Profiles.html#task-645</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>D7BF80C8-D4DA-440C-B232-3BAFC55E2FC2</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>D7BF80C8-D4DA-440C-B232-3BAFC55E2FC2</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>org.mozilla.firefox </key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>DisableAppUpdate</key><true/><key>EnterprisePoliciesEnabled</key><true/></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
